project: Rozvoj kapacit v kyberbezpecnosti v Kenske republice
title: Rozvoj kapacit v kyberbezpecnosti v Kenske republice

metadata.agency: Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Czech Republic
metadata.program: Posilovani kapacit verejnych vysokych skol v rozvojovych zemich - vyhlaseni dotacniho programu pro rok 2025

abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.text: The project aims to develop capacity in cybersecurity in the Republic of Kenya through: i) creating/updating a cybersecurity curriculum, ii) technical assistance, and iii) knowledge transfer and skills enhancement through mobility.

team_members.label: Team members
team_members.text: Rysavy Ondrej, doc. Ing., Ph.D. (DIFS) – research leader Kreslik Frantisek, Ing. (CVT) Matousek Petr, doc. Ing., Ph.D., M.A. (DIFS) Mutua Nelson Makau, M.Sc. (DIFS) Studena Michaela, Ing. (External relations) Zemcik Pavel, prof. Dr. Ing., dr. h. c. (DCGM)
